mapper.select: SELECT ID, COMP_CD, DOC_TYP, TPL_NM, AMT_FROM, AMT_TO, SORT_NO, USE_YN, REG_ID FROM AP_LINE_TPL WHERE DEL_YN='N' AND DOC_TYP=#{docTyp} ORDER BY DOC_TYP, SORT_NO, AMT_FROM
SELECT ID, COMP_CD, DOC_TYP, TPL_NM, AMT_FROM, AMT_TO, SORT_NO, USE_YN, REG_ID FROM AP_LINE_TPL WHERE ID=#{id} AND DEL_YN='N'

SELECT S.ID, S.TPL_ID, S.STEP_NO, S.LINE_TYP, T.CD_NM_KO AS LINE_TYP_NM, S.APRV_USR_ID, S.APRV_USR_NM, S.FINAL_YN FROM AP_LINE_TPL_STEP S LEFT JOIN CM_CODE T ON T.GRP_CD='AP_LINE_TYP' AND T.CD=S.LINE_TYP AND T.DEL_YN='N' WHERE S.TPL_ID=#{tplId} ORDER BY S.STEP_NO

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ID, COMP_CD, DOC_TYP, TPL_NM, AMT_FROM, AMT_TO, SORT_NO, USE_YN FROM AP_LINE_TPL WHERE DEL_YN='N' AND USE_YN='Y' AND COMP_CD=#{compCd} AND DOC_TYP=#{docTyp} AND #{amount} BETWEEN AMT_FROM AND AMT_TO ORDER BY SORT_NO, AMT_FROM ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AP_LINE_TPL (COMP_CD, DOC_TYP, TPL_NM, AMT_FROM, AMT_TO, SORT_NO, USE_YN, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{docTyp}, #{tplNm}, NVL(#{amtFrom},0), NVL(#{amtTo},999999999999), NVL(#{sortNo},1), NVL(#{useYn},'Y'), #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE AP_LINE_TPL SET DEL_YN='Y', MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AP_LINE_TPL_STEP (TPL_ID, STEP_NO, LINE_TYP, APRV_USR_ID, APRV_USR_NM, FINAL_YN, REG_ID) VALUES (#{tplId}, #{stepNo}, NVL(#{lineTyp},'APRV'), #{aprvUsrId}, #{aprvUsrNm}, NVL(#{finalYn},'N'), 'SYSTEM')
